# nirvana_nks_cluster_kubeconfig (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nirvana_nks_cluster_kubeconfig" "example_nks_cluster_kubeconfig" {
  cluster_id = "cluster_id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `kubeconfig` (String, Sensitive) Kubeconfig content for the Cluster.
